title: Split routes/remoteProxy.js into pod-lifecycle + proxy-forward modules
description: REFACTOR (from 2026-07-02 complexity audit; ~2h, low risk). remoteProxy.js is 1,610 lines mixing 6 responsibilities: Pod lifecycle (create/reconnect/stop/delete/teardown/orphan sweep), inline Pod spec construction (CPU/GPU/ephemeral/Blackwell branching), /proxy/* forwarding (9 boilerplate fetch->passthrough routes), SSE relay + keepalive, 6+ module-level state vars (_mode/_startedPodId/_connecting/_starting/_healthVerdict/_lastPodStatus), model-presence bridging. Every RunPod card (MPI-139/152/156/160/169) touches it. SPLIT: routes/remotePodLifecycle.js (~900 lines: lifecycle + spec builder + state) + routes/remoteProxyForward.js (~300 lines: the /proxy/* routes) + keep telemetry helpers (_metricFromPod cluster ~420-465) together. getRemoteMode/setRemoteMode stay on lifecycle module (referenced by remoteModels.js + main.js). Express routing additive, no behavior change. Verify: remote connect + gen + disconnect cycle. BRANCH: RunPod.
